# Active TODOs

## Generated by Cowork Session 1 (2026-04-16)

### Urgent

- [ ] **Run Phase 6 in a separate Cowork session with the MannaFest Next.js repo mounted.** The 3D nebula graph implementation was deferred because the repo lives outside this Ark mount. All schema dependencies (`connection_explanations` FK'd to `graph_nodes`) are in place and ready for consumption by the `ConnectionPanel` component. Brief: see section "PHASE 6" in `99-archive/imports/2026-04-16-cowork-master-brief.md`.
- [ ] **Set up a git remote for the Ark and push.** The Ark has been receiving commits throughout session 1 but no `origin` remote is configured yet. `git remote add origin <url> && git push -u origin master` when ready.
- [ ] **Sync the Cowork-external `.git` back to the mount.** Because of virtiofs permission asymmetry on Windows mounts, Cowork operated against a copy of `.git` in its own sandbox. Marcus should either: (a) rsync the commit objects and refs back into `~/Documents/MannaFest/ark/.git/`, or (b) once a remote is set up, let the authoritative history live there and re-clone locally. Either path works.

These theme nodes exist but have no `connection_explanations` row yet.
